@if (countdown() === 0 && resendAttempts < maxAttempts) {

Email Sent!

} @if (countdown() !== 0 && resendAttempts < maxAttempts) {

} @if (resendAttempts >= maxAttempts) {

} @if (resendAttempts >= maxAttempts) {

}
}
